---
title: "Outlier Detection and Robust Linear Regression"
pdf-engine: xelatex
documentclass: article
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
bibliography: references.bib
link-citations: true
toc: true
---
